context: Tests whether the agent uses current iOS 26 SpeechAnalyzer and SpeechTranscriber guidance for live transcription without stale or unsupported API claims.

checklist.name: Documented transcriber preset
checklist.description: Uses SpeechAnalyzer with SpeechTranscriber and a documented preset such as .timeIndexedProgressiveTranscription, not .offlineTranscription.

checklist.name: Support checks
checklist.description: Checks SpeechTranscriber.isAvailable and supportedLocale(equivalentTo:) or equivalent supported locale state before starting transcription.

checklist.name: Asset installation
checklist.description: Installs or verifies model assets with AssetInventory.assetInstallationRequest(supporting:) before analysis.

checklist.name: Compatible audio format
checklist.description: Converts AVAudioEngine microphone buffers to SpeechAnalyzer.bestAvailableAudioFormat(compatibleWith:) before yielding AnalyzerInput.

checklist.name: Volatile and final results
checklist.description: Handles volatile results separately from finalized results so live transcript text is replaced rather than duplicated.

checklist.name: Session finalization
checklist.description: Explicitly finalizes or cancels the analyzer session after input ends instead of assuming the input stream finish is enough.
